message.content:
@startuml
title 基于GitHub的实验管理平台--选择课程用例的顺序图

actor "教师" as teacher
actor "系统" as system

participant "课程信息" as course_info
participant "选课信息" as enrollment_info
participant "实验信息" as experiment_info
participant "评分细则信息" as grading_info
participant "实验评分信息" as experiment_grading_info

teacher -> system: 发起评分请求
activate system
system -> course_info: 查询本学期当前教师所教授的课程
activate course_info
course_info --> system: 返回课程信息
deactivate course_info
system --> teacher: 返回课程信息

teacher -> system: 选择需要评分的课程
activate system
system -> enrollment_info: 查询选择本课程的学生信息
activate enrollment_info
enrollment_info --> system: 返回学生信息
deactivate enrollment_info
system --> teacher: 返回学生信息

loop 对每个学生进行评分
teacher -> system: 选择需要评分的学生
activate system
system -> experiment_info: 查询当前课程的实验信息
activate experiment_info
experiment_info --> system: 返回当前课程的实验信息
deactivate experiment_info

system -> grading_info: 查询每个实验的评分细则信息
activate grading_info
grading_info --> system: 返回评分细则信息
deactivate grading_info

system -> experiment_grading_info: 查询本学生当前课程已被评分的细则信息
activate experiment_grading_info
experiment_grading_info --> system: 返回信息
deactivate experiment_grading_info

system --> teacher: 返回本学生当前课程的实验信息

teacher -> system: 进行评分
activate system
system -> experiment_grading_info: 存储评分
activate experiment_grading_info
experiment_grading_info --> system: 存储成功
deactivate experiment_grading_info

system -> enrollment_info: 统计课程总分数
activate enrollment_info
enrollment_info --> system: 统计成功
deactivate enrollment_info

system --> teacher: 评分成功
deactivate system
endloop

deactivate teacher
@enduml
